stem: The Control Unit (CU) is a component inside the CPU.
model_answer: The Control Unit fetches, decodes and coordinates the execution of instructions. It directs the flow of data between the CPU, memory and other components by sending control signals.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Describe the purpose of the Control Unit.

mark_points.text: decodes instructions and coordinates their execution
accepted_alternatives: tells other components what to do

mark_points.text: directs the flow of data between the CPU, memory and other components using control signals
accepted_alternatives: sends signals to coordinate the CPU
